item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from Ms. Burnie, Mr. Warner, Mr. Brookes:
item.description: The first tryout for the grade 7 - 8 girls basketball team is tonight from 2:25 pm to 4:00 pm and the next one will be Wednesday the 25th from 2:25 pm to 4:00 pm. Attending both tryouts is strongly encouraged, however; you must attend at least one of the tryouts to be eligible for the team.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: Due to the inclement weather day on Friday, February 20th, the scheduled Ravens's Wear day will now be on Friday, February 27th

item.title: A message from: Mme. Laneville:
item.description: There are still 6 spots available on the French Immersion trip to France and Switzerland in October 2027. You must currently be taking grade 9 or 10 French immersion to apply. If you would like more information, please send Mme Laneville a Teams message.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bertrand:
item.description: Do you love yarn, crochet hooks, and knitting needles? Do you enjoy working on projects and getting creative? Then you are my people. I am currently looking for Grade 9-12 students who are interested in joining a crochet/knitting club for charity because who doesn't love giving back to the community? If you are interested, please see Mme. Bertrand in Rm. 213 at 10:40 today (lunch). Crochet ... it's off the hook, and I am not yarning your chain. Thank you! Hope to see you there!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok and Mme Perron:
item.description: High school students, don't miss your chance to attend this year's Black History Month "Elevate and Empower" event! Our panel is being held on Thursday during period 2, and you can sign up using the QR codes on the posters in your classrooms. Deadline to register is tomorrow at 11:30am.

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: There will be a unity club meeting in room 126 every lunch hour this week in order to prepare for our Elevate and Empower event all presenters must attend!

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: Could all Europe Trip students please return their 50/50 sold tickets and money to Mme Perron by Wednesday, Feb 25th. Please also return ALL UNSOLD tickets as we will be selling them at a community event later this week.
